source_note: Oregon PUC Order No. 22-191 (entered May 31, 2022), Docket UE 398, in the matter of Idaho Power Company's 2022 Annual Power Cost Update (APCU) (15 pp) — the Commission's annual update of Idaho Power's Oregon net power supply expense in rates. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Oregon PUC orders archive (apps.puc.state.or.us/orders/2022ords/22-191.pdf).
